name: Red Nose Guy The LegenDairy Quest
short_description: Red Nose Guy: The LegenDairy Quest is a modern and high-energy revisit of an arcade classic.Join Red Nose Guy on an adventure through the city's various neighborhoods and discover his colorful and absurd universe!
detailed_description:
Red Nose Guy: The LegenDairy Quest is a modern and high-energy revisit of an arcade classic.
Join Red Nose Guy on an adventure through the city's various neighborhoods and discover his colorful and absurd universe!

Red Nose Guy just wants to buy his milk, but to do so, he must travel a long way.
The whole world is against him, so help him out!



How to play
  • Launch your grapple to burst the balls,
  • Each ball hit splits into two smaller balls,
  • Make all the balls disappear,
  • Don't exceed the time limit,
  • Collect bonuses for more points and extra lives.

Experience the arcade challenge with the Story mode
  • A time limit per level,
  • Levels are played sequentially in a single gaming session,
  • Restart the Story endlessly until you complete it entirely or to improve your score.

Play in Panic mode
  • Play all 11 levels in one go,
  • Balls continuously spawn with no time limit,
  • The further you progress, the harder it gets,
  • Achieve the highest score and top the leaderboard.

Game Features
  • 3 levels of difficulty,
  • 11 levels per difficulty, each with a unique and animated scenery,
  • Bonuses, animated characters, increasing difficulty,
  • Global leaderboard of high scores.

Complete all the Stories and help Red Nose Guy retrieve his milk.
